system.effect: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use Team Up this turn.
Abilities can't increase a Minion's Max HP. Abilities granted by Templates deal half damage and no bonus damage.
Replaces Melee Attack

Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Melee Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains +1 Advantage on their next Attack Roll.

Requires Melee Attack.
Melee Attack gains +1 Range.
If the Minion Resists an effect that would deal half damage: the Minion takes no damage.
When this minion is defeated: adjacent characters take [tier]+2 damage.

• At the end of a turn granted by Team Up: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use Team Up this turn.
  • When a hostile character defeats this minion during their turn: that character gains (?). A character can only gain AP this way 1/Round.

Perform Take Cover only as the last Action in a turn.
Attacks against the Minion have +1 Disadvantage until the start of its next turn.
If the target has no adjacent allies, Backstab has +1 Advantage and On Hit: Bleeding 1+[tier].

Condition: The Assassin takes damage.
Effect: The Assassin performs Evade and moves an extra tile when Evading this way.
The Assassin can move diagonally.

Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Stunned +1.
If the target has no adjacent allies: reduce the cost of Sap to 1 AP.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Immobilized until the end of their next turn.

• Flurry
  • Deals Piercing Damage.
  • On Hit: Bleeding +1.
The Assassin gains Concealment 6 until the end of its next turn.
This turn, while moving, the Assassin is Flying.

Condition: An adjacent hostile character with no adjacent allies performs a Movement Action.

Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or loses that Movement Action and becomes Prone.
Backstab's 1/Round limit is ignored against characters with no adjacent allies.

• Perform Death Attack of Opportunity only while the Assassin is adjacent to exactly one hostile character.
  • Condition: An adjacent hostile character performs a Movement Action.
  • Effect: Perform Backstab on the triggering character before the triggering Action. It gains On Damage: Bleeding +1.
Target allied character clears a hostile Condition.
Target allied character receives Healing equal to their Max HP (half for Elite/Legendary).

Condition: An allied character receives a hostile Condition.
Effect: The Medic moves toward that character.
Deals Piercing Damage. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Vulnerable until they perform Refocus.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Prone and suffers Push 2. A character that Resists suffers Push 1.
1/Round. A target allied character performs Refocus if able.
The Medic's Support Actions have Range 4.
The Medic's Spell Actions aren't Spells and don't provoke Reactions.
Heal costs 2 AP but instead provides Regeneration X where X is half the target's missing HP.
Target allied character gains Barrier [tier]+2. This Barrier doesn't end as turns end.

+1 Disadvantage. On Hit: The Beast can perform Clamp as a Free Action.

Against an Immobilized character: The attack has +1 Advantage and +3 Bonus Damage.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or is Immobilized until they are no longer adjacent to the Beast.

1/Round. Perform Thrash only while a hostile character is Immobilized by Clamp. The Beast and the Immobilized character simultaneously move 1 tile in any direction. This movement doesn't provoke Reactions.

1/Encounter. The Beast moves twice its SPD. During this movement: it can't change directions, passes through hostile characters, has Damage Resistance, ignores Difficult Terrain, and hostile characters it becomes adjacent to make a Resistance Roll, becoming Prone on a failure. At the end of this movement: the Beast can perform Clamp as a Free Action.

Perform Ragdoll only if a hostile character was Immobilized by Clamp at the beginning of the Beast's turn. The Immobilized character suffers Push 4, Stunned 1 and Chaos Damage equal to half their current HP. If it collides with another character both characters become Prone.
For the rest of the encounter: The Beast has 0 Armor and can't receive Healing or be targeted by Support Actions. It gains +1 SPD and gains 1 AP at the beginning of each of its turns.
Characters Immobilized by the Beast's Clamp have +1 Disadvantage on Attack Rolls and Resistance Rolls.
When the Beast's Melee Attack hits a character Immobilized by Clamp: That character is Sundered for the rest of the encounter.
On Hit: Push 1. Target makes a Resistance Roll or falls Prone.

Condition: The Guardian takes damage from a hostile character within Range 2.
Effect: Deal [tier]+1 damage to the attacker within Range 2. This is a Free Reaction and can be used any number of times.
Hostile characters treat adjacent spaces as Difficult Terrain.
The Guardian and adjacent allies have Damage Resistance. This doesn't apply while the Guardian is Prone, Stunned, Slowed, or Immobilized.
All characters within Range 2 make a Resistance Roll, becoming Prone and Stunned +1 on a failure. Adjacent allied characters have +1 Advantage on the Resistance Roll.
When you perform Bouncing Shield and hit, you may repeat the attack with Flurry against a different character within Range 2 of the previous target. This effect can occur no more than [tier]+1 times.

Target allied character becomes Invulnerable until the start of the Guardian's next turn, or until the Guardian is defeated or moves beyond Range 3. While this is active: The Guardian loses Unbreakable.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Heavy Attack performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Heavy Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
Counterattack deals Piercing Damage.
The first time the Guardian is hit by an Attack each round: The Guardian is Invulnerable to that attack, and it deals no Bonus Damage.
+1 Advantage when not the Sentinel's turn.

• Condition: A hostile character within Range 2 performs a Movement Action.
  • Effect: Perform Melee Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
The next time the Sentinel would perform Melee Attack against a target, the Sentinel performs Melee Attack twice against that target instead.

The Sentinel is Immobilized until Combat Reflexes is deactivated. (Deactivate: ◆◆).

While active: Attack of Opportunity is 1/Turn instead of 1/Round.

1/Round. Condition: The Sentinel is dealt any amount of damage and bonus damage from a single source.
Effect: The Sentinel gains Damage Resistance against the triggering damage. An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains +1 Advantage on their next Attack Roll.
Attack of Opportunity gains On Hit: The target is Immobilized until the start of their next turn.
Melee Attack gains +1 Range.
Attack of Opportunity has the following additional Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs a Spell Action.
Attack of Opportunity has the following additional Condition: A hostile character within the Range of Melee Attack performs an Action that targets an adjacent allied character.
The Sentinel ignores Difficult Terrain.

Perform Executioner's Swing only with Initiative.

+1 Advantage.

Deals bonus Piercing Chaos Damage equal to half the target's max HP.
Reduces the AP Cost of the next Executioner's Swing by 1. Executioner's Swing can't be performed next turn.
Flurry. On Hit: Pull the target adjacent to the Executioner.
Adjacent hostile characters can't move or be moved except by their own Actions.
Flurry. 1/Round. On Hit: The target is Silenced until the end of their next turn. (A Silenced character can't perform Spell Actions.)
The Executioner has Damage Resistance while adjacent to a hostile character.
When the Executioner reduces a hostile character to 0 HP hostile characters in a Size 3 Area centered on the Executioner make a Resistance Roll. A character that fails is Immobilized 1.

On Hit: The target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Prone.

The Scourge has an Adaptation, chosen during creation:

  • Wings: The Scourge is Flying.
  • Plating: The Scourge has +2 Armor.
  • Fast: The Scourge has +1 Speed.
  • Reflective: The Scourge has +1 Advantage on Resistance Rolls.
Perform Emanation only with Initiative.
Perform Emanation only with Initiative.

Targets a Size 1 Area within Range 2.

Perform Emanation only with Initiative.
+1 Advantage against characters in Difficult Terrain. On Hit: Poisoned +1.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within the Spider's attack range performs a Movement Action.
Effect: Perform Swift Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Action.
1/Encounter. Creates Difficult Terrain in a Size 1 Area within Range 3.
Ignores Difficult Terrain.
When the Spider's Difficult Terrain causes a hostile character to spend additional movement: That character is Poisoned +1. (No roll.)
Difficult Terrain created by the Spider's Snare requires one additional Speed of movement per tile entered.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character performs a Movement Action while within a Snare, or enters a Snare during movement.
Effect: The Spider performs a Movement Action. It must end this movement closer to the triggering character than it began.
At the beginning of the Spider's turn: Choose any number of Snares in play. For each chosen Snare move it to a tile within Range 2 of that Snare. (It doesn't cross the intervening distance.)
While within a Snare: The Spider has Concealment 3.
+1 Advantage against characters in Difficult Terrain. On Hit: Poisoned +2.
Set Snare is Charged instead of 1/Encounter.
On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or�During the target's next turn: that character's non-Basic Actions have Focus Cost +1.
Target takes [tier]+4 Chaos Damage at the end of their next turn unless they spend Focus.
Teleport up to Range 6. This movement doesn't provoke Reactions.
1/Round. On Hit: If the target has no Focus remaining deals bonus Chaos Damage equal to that character's maximum HP.
Target hostile character with less than half their maximum Focus remaining becomes Slowed +1. (No roll.)
1/Round. On Hit: Target performs Move in a direction of the Mindflayer's choice unless they spend [tier]+1 Focus.

A Mindleech Trap deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or loses [tier]+2 Focus. Whether or not they Resist they become Immobilized until the end of their next turn if they have less than half their maximum Focus remaining.
A hostile character that spends Focus while adjacent to the Mindflayer takes that much Chaos Damage.
The Mindflayer has Damage Resistance from characters with less than half their maximum Focus remaining.
Compulsion targets all hostile characters in a Size 1 Area within range.
The Angel becomes Immobilized. Allied characters in a Size 2 Area centered on the Angel have +1 Advantage on Resistance Rolls, and attacks against them have +1 Disadvantage.
At the start of the Angel's turn it clears a hostile Condition.
1/Round. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure that character performs Move toward the Angel.
+1 Disadvantage if the Angel has performed an Attack this turn.
Target hostile character becomes Blinded 3 until the end of their next turn. (No roll.)
Hostile characters in Principality are Sundered.
A friendly character that begins their turn in Principality or moves into Principality for the first time during their turn receives 2 Healing.
Targets two Size 1 Areas. On Attack: The Invoker becomes Immobilized 1.
The Invoker's next Flame Strike has On Damage: The target becomes Prone.
When Flame Strike targets the same areas as the Invoker's previous Flame Strike, the Invoker has +1 Advantage on the Attack.
Treats obstructions as Cover when determining attack lines.
Damage Resistance from Melee Actions.

An Exploding Trap deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll or suffers [tier]+4 Damage and Push 2. A character that Resists suffers half damage and isn't pushed.
Teleport to a free tile within range. Blink doesn't provoke Reactions.
Flame Strike gains On Miss: The target suffers Bleeding +1. (No roll.)
Flame Strike becomes Charged and can only be performed with Initiative. On Damage: The target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Stunned +2.

The Invoker ignores Concealment and Stealth Actions. Flame Strike leaves a lingering Size 1 Area until the Invoker next performs Flame Strike. A character in this area loses Concealment and can't perform Stealth Actions.
1/Round. On Hit: Target makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Dazed +1.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within Range 4 makes an Action Resolution where the dice show exactly two "1"s.
Effect: Consult the other number shown on the dice. For the rest of the encounter or until the Aberration is defeated � that character treats that value on any die they roll (including an Action Resolution, Advantage, Disadvantage, or damage die) as a 0.
The Aberration can move diagonally.

When the Aberration deals damage or inflicts a Condition to a hostile non-Summoned character, the hostile character subsequently named in alphabetical order (looping, if necessary) also suffers that much damage or suffers that Condition. (Apply the base damage before defenses. No roll.)

Perform Destroy Summon only with Initiative.

On Hit: The target Summoned character is reduced to 0 HP. (No roll.)
Adjacent hostile character makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure for the rest of the encounter: that character can't pay the Inspiration costs of non-Ultimate abilities.

1/Round. Condition: A hostile character within Range 4 is reduced to 0 HP.
Effect: For the rest of the Quest, that character can't use a Narrative Tag of the Aberration's choice.

An Aberration can Hide only if it performed Hunker Down last turn. 1/Round. Condition: A hostile character begins their turn.
Effect: That character makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure this turn that character can't target the Aberration with Actions that target only one character.
Backstab also inflicts Slowed +1 on a failed Resistance Roll.
The Aberration recovers half its maximum HP when performing Refocus.
The Aberration ignores Damage and Conditions from Actions that share a name with the last Action to inflict Damage or a Condition on the Aberration.
The Aberration ignores Difficult Terrain and can move through hostile characters.

When the Aberration becomes adjacent to a map edge: The Aberration may Teleport to the opposite map edge appearing in the nearest free tile. The Aberration ends the current Movement and loses all unspent AP.
Max HP +5
Damage Resistance from Spell Actions.
On Hit: The target is Silenced 1. (They can't perform Spell Actions. It's a special Condition.)
Max HP +5

• The character occupies an area of increased size. They can fit into an area as small as 1x2 but treat that area as Difficult Terrain.
  • The character is immune to Involuntary Movement.
  • The character can never gain Concealment or perform Stealth Actions.

(Areas of effect that originate from a Large character may be larger. Range is drawn from or to any tile you occupy.)
Can't be Immobilized.
+1 Armor (max. 3).
Max HP +5
An allied character in Range performs Move.

• Condition: An allied character fails Resistance Roll.
  • Effect: The character gains 3 Barrier and prevents up to one Condition applied by the triggering Resistance Roll's effect.
An allied character in Range performs a non-Spell Attack Action that costs 2 AP or less as a Free Action. It deals half damage and no bonus damage.
Immune to Difficult Terrain.
A hostile character in Range loses Concealment and becomes Off Guard.
The Ranger's Ranged Attack Actions have +2 Range and Minimum Range 3. (They can't target characters closer than 3 spaces away.)
Concealment 2 while in Difficult Terrain.
Treats obstructions as cover.

• Flurry
  • After spending AP to perform Melee Attack: Repeat Melee Attack as a Free Action a number of times equal to the Duelist's level.

The Duelist marks a target. The Duelist treats the marked target as Sundered and has Damage Resistance from the marked target, and their attacks against the marked target have +1 Advantage. The mark lasts for the rest of the scene, until the marked target is reduced to 0 HP, or until this Action is performed again.

When the Marked target is reduced to 0 HP, recharge Duel.

Condition: A character hits the Duelist with the Attack Roll of a Melee Weapon Attack.

Effect: The Duelist makes an Attack Roll against that character. On a hit, the triggering attack roll misses instead.
The Duelist's attacks have On Critical Hit: The target chooses - they are Dazed 3, Slowed 2, or Immobilized 1. They can't choose a condition they have already.

• Flurry
  • On Hit: The Duelist may Move 2. The movement doesn't trigger Reactions.
Each round, the first Reaction the Duelist triggers has no effect.

• Maximum HP is doubled.
  • Takes an additional turn in combat, and has an additional ability.
  • The additional ability is either an Elite ability or an ability from any NPC class.
Move 1, ignoring difficult terrain. Elite Dodge doesn't trigger hostile Reactions.
Target hostile character makes a Resistance Roll or becomes Prone and suffers Push 2. A character that Resists suffers Push 1.

Condition: A hostile character within the range of a Melee Attack Action performs a Movement Action.

Effect: Perform that Melee Attack on the triggering character before the triggering Movement. The attack deals half damage.
Target hostile character becomes Off Guard and makes a Resistance Roll or is Immobilized 1. A character that Resists is Slowed 1.
Unlimited reactions per turn.
+1 Defense and +1 Advantage on Resistance Rolls.

Bind to an Attack Action. (Bind when the NPC is created.)
The Bound Attack has +1 Advantage and deals +4 Bonus Damage on a Critical Hit.
The Elite has an additional turn in combat, but has Maximum Turn AP: 2.
The Elite is Flying while moving.

• The Large NPC can't change directions during Movement and has a Directional Shield. It has Damage Resistance against attacks drawn through one side (the shielded side) of its token. It chooses which side of its token is the shielded side at the end of any Movement.
  • The NPC is no longer immune to involuntary movement, but if it would suffer Push or Pull, instead: it doesn't, and the source of that Push or Pull may change the token's shielded side to a side of their choice.
Phantasm Arrow treats Obstructions as Cover. All characters in the Line become targets.
Swap places with a Phantasmata within Range.

Create a Phantasmata in a free tile within range. Phantasmata have the same Defense as the character that created them, automatically succeed on Resistance Rolls, and take no damage when succeeding on a Resistance Roll. A character can destroy a Phantasmata with a successful Attack that deals 1 or more damage, or by Studying it with a successful Resistance Roll.

If you have no active Phantasmata: For each hostile scoring character, create one Phantasmata in a free tile within range. Phantasmata have the same Defense as the character that created them, automatically succeed on Resistance Rolls, and take no damage when succeeding on a Resistance Roll. A character can destroy a Phantasmata with a successful Attack that deals 1 or more damage, or by Studying it with a successful Resistance Roll.

Deception is a Free Reaction.

'- Condition: The Phantasm becomes the target of any Attack Action while a Phantasmata is within Range 10 of the Phantasm.

  • Effect: The attacker makes a Resistance Roll. On a failure, the Phantasmata is destroyed and the Phantasm teleports to its tile. The attack misses automatically, and the Phantasm suffers no damage or secondary effects from the attack.

• All hostile characters in Range become targets.
  • When a Phantasmata is destroyed, that Phantasmata performs this attack.

• Condition: The Phantasm takes nonzero damage.
  • Effect: The Phantasm creates a Phantasmata in an adjacent tile, then gains Concealment 3 and may Move 4. This Movement doesn't trigger hostile Reactions.

Create a Phantasmata adjacent to up to one hostile character in Range. That character makes a Resistance Roll or is perpetually Dazed until they end a turn while not within Range 5 of a Phantasm. A character that Resists is Dazed 1.

• When performing Phantasm Arrow, you may draw the line from any active Phantasmata.
  • When Phantasm Arrow's line extends through a Phantasmata, instead of attacking that Phantasmata, the Line terminates and may extend in a new Line 5 originating from that Phantasmata.
Attacks against allied characters adjacent to a Phantasmata have +1 Disadvantage.
Emanation's damage is doubled. When the Scourge chooses an area with Emanation, that attack doesn't occur until the beginning of the Scourge's first turn next round.

• Deals Chaos Damage.
    On Attack: The target becomes Off Guard.
    On Hit: The target is Sundered 1.
The Scourge may Move 2 before performing any Attack Action. This movement doesn't trigger hostile Reactions.

The Scourge may Teleport to a free space within Range. Then, characters adjacent to the Scourge make a Resistance Roll or take [tier] damage and become Prone. A character that Resists takes half damage and isn't Prone.

The Scourge gains [tier] Barrier and Moves twice its Speed. During this movement, it can't change directions and can pass through hostile characters. Hostile characters it passes through make a Resistance Roll or take [tier] damage, become Prone, and are Bleeding +[tier]; a character that Resists takes half damage and isn't Bleeding or Prone.

Up to one character the Scourge becomes adjacent to at any point during this Movement is dragged to the Scourge's destination. If that character Collides with an obstruction or another character, they become Prone and the dragged character and obstruction (or both colliding characters) take [tier] Chaos Damage. (No roll.)
The Scourge recovers half its maximum HP when performing Refocus.

• Condition: A hostile character within Range 2 clears Prone.
  • Effect: Peform the Attack on that character.

On Hit: Push 2. Collide: Dazed +2.

All hostile characters in a Size 1 Area that contains a free space adjacent to the Scourge become targets. Those characters make a Resistance Roll or are Prone and suffer Push 2. A character that Resists suffers Push 1 and isn't Prone.

All hostile characters in a Size 1 Area that contains a free space adjacent to the Executioner become targets. Those characters are Dazed 1 and make a Resistance Roll or become Prone and Sundered 1. Create a 10 HP Obstruction in a free space in the area.
Allied characters can use this character as Cover.

• Condition: An allied character within Principality is hit with an attack.

  • Effect: Deactivate Principality as part of this Reaction. The character has Damage Resistance to the triggering attack and ignores up to one Condition inflicted by that attack.

+1 Advantage

On Critical Hit: The target is Blinded 3.
Principality is centered on a free space within Range 8 instead of on the Angel.

All hostile characters within Principality become targets. Those characters make a Resistance Roll or are Blinded 3 and choose: immediately perform Basic Move Actions until they are no longer within Principality, or suffer 2[tier] damage. A character that Resists is Blinded 1.
The Angel ignores Difficult Terrain and doesn't trigger Traps during Movement Actions.
Up to one hostile character in Range makes a Resistance Roll or is Disarmed 1. Characters adjacent to that character take 2 damage.

• Condition: A character that is not marked by Duel makes a non-Spell Attack against the Duelist.
  • Effect: The Duelist gains Concealment 3 for the duration of the attack, and the attack gains On Miss: Repeat the attack against yourself as a part of this Action.

Characters in a Size 2 Area centered on the Duelist become targets unless they have Cover from the Duelist. Those characters make a Resistance Roll or are Dazed +3. A character that Resists is Dazed 1.
Choose up to one character in Range. Until that character performs Refocus, all of the Duelist's attacks against that character are critical hits.
Perform the Basic Move Action as a part of this Action. Before or after this Movement, hostile characters in a Size 2 Area centered on the Brute become Off Guard.

• Flurry.
  • On Attack: The Brute is Disarmed 1.
  • On Hit: The target becomes Prone.

• Condition: This character performs Refocus.
  • Effect: Perform Move Order or Attack Order as a part of this Reaction.
1/Round as a part of performing this Action: Move 2 and repeat the Attack with Flurry against another hostile character. Flail doesn't trigger hostile Reactions.
1/Round: A damaged adjacent allied character gets Barrier [tier].
Up to one hostile character in Range becomes Off Guard and makes a Resistance Roll or is Dazed +1.
Graze doesn't affect a target that has Cover.
Flurry

Charged

Choose up to one hostile character within Range of the Sharpshooter's Ranged Attack. That character becomes Off Guard, and until the end of that character's next turn, as they perform their first Movement Action, that character chooses: Prevent that Action, or allow the Sharpshooter to perform Ranged Attack on them as a Free Reaction is able. (The costs of a prevented Action are still paid.)
This turn, the Sharpshooter is Flying while moving.
Choose a Size 1 Area centered on a space within Range 4. The Sharpshooter performs Ranged Attack as part of this Action. All characters in the area become targets.
Create a 10 HP Object in an adjacent free space. It's Difficult Terrain, Cover, and Destructible.

Perform Called Shot only during the Sharpshooter's turn. The Sharpshooter ends their turn.

Until the Sharpshooter begins any movement, their next Ranged Attack has On Hit: The Sharpshooter chooses�the target becomes Blinded 3, Silenced 1, or Immobilized 1.

A Mancatcher Trap deploys in a free space. It�s armed at the end of the Sharpshooter�s turn and triggered when a hostile character becomes adjacent to it.

Effect: Hostile characters adjacent to the trap make a Resistance Roll or suffer Bleeding [LV]+1 and Slowed 1. A character that Resists takes half as much Bleeding and aren�t Slowed.
The Ranged Attack Action made by Overwatch has +1 Accuracy and treats Obstructions as Cover.

Passive: The Sharpshooter can Evade.

Perform The Pawn Free Action only while the Sharpshooter has Initiative. Perform the Basic Move Action as part of this Free Action. The Sharpshooter can't Attack this turn.

Up to one hostile character in Range makes a Resistance Roll or is perpetually Marked by Hostage's Bane until they Refocus or the Displacer performs Hostage's Bane again.

While a character is Marked by Hostage's Bane, the Displacer has Damage Resistance against Attack Actions, and whenever an Attack Action deals damage to the Displacer, the Displacer deals that much damage to the Marked character.
Up to one hostile character in Range becomes Off Guard and makes a Resistance Roll or is Dazed +1.

Vortex Warp doesn't trigger hostile Reactions.

Choose One:

  • The Displacer switches places with an allied character in Range. (Each teleports to the other's space simultaneously.)
  • Up to one allied character in Range may Teleport 4. The Teleport doesn't require Line of Effect.
The Displacer can Evade. Attack Reactions targeting a Displacer have +1 Disadvantage.

Create Portals in two free spaces within Range. They're 10 HP Objects that are Destructible Obstructions. Whenever a character ends a turn adjacent to a Portal, that character may Teleport to any space adjacent to another other Portal as a Free Reaction.

+1 Advantage

On Damage: The target Teleports equal to the total damage dealt, controlled by the Displacer. If it was a Critical Hit, Teleport twice as far.
End of Turn: The Displacer receives [tier] Healing unless it was Stunned, Slowed, Dazed, or Immobilized at any time this turn.

Up to one hostile character in Range makes a Resistance Roll or gains Concealment 6.

The Actions of a character with Concealment gained this way have no effect on characters other than the Displacer. (Their attacks inflict no damage and have no on-hit effects; they can't force resistance rolls or inflict statuses or conditions, and their abilities provide no healing to these characters.)

Condition: An allied character within Range is hit by an Attack as part of an Attack Action.

Effect: Interrupt the triggering Action�The attacked character gains Damage Resistance against the attack's damage, prevents all Conditions inflicted by the attack, and may Teleport 4.
